# Cinemora Studios

> Cinemora Studios is a founder-led creative growth studio that builds personal brands, content systems, websites, and AI operations designed to turn attention into qualified clients.

## Canonical website

- https://www.cinemorastudios.agency/
- Book a strategy call: https://www.cinemorastudios.agency/booking

## Identity

- Brand: Cinemora Studios
- Alternate names: Cinemora, Cinemora Studio
- Founder and Creative Director: Iqrar Hussain
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cinemorastudios
- Company LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cinemora-studios
- Location: Office No. 203, Jenan Abn Ul Fazl Plaza, Shamsabad, Rawalpindi, Pakistan

## Core services

- Personal branding and positioning
- Content strategy and video production
- Social media growth systems
- Web design and development
- AI automation and business operations
- Lead generation and conversion systems

## Selected documented outcomes

- More than 50 million organic views generated or managed
- Content systems supporting $238 million in real estate sales
- Spoken Wines grew from 1,000 to 10,000 YouTube subscribers
- Success School grew from approximately $10K–$20K monthly revenue to $100K months
